title: Your First Test
instruction: Implement add(a, b int) int to return a+b. Result 5 should print PASS.

title: Table-Driven Tests
instruction: Implement multiply(a, b int) int. All four cases should print PASS.

title: Test Helper Functions
instruction: Implement subtract (a-b) and check(label, got, want) that prints PASS or FAIL.
hint: subtract return a - b; check: if got==want print PASS [label] else FAIL

title: Testing Edge Cases
instruction: Implement clamp(val, min, max int): return min if val<min, max if val>max, else val. All 5 PASS.
hint: if val < min return min; if val > max return max; return val

title: Benchmark: Measuring Performance
instruction: Implement buildWithPlus (result += "x" in loop) and buildWithBuilder (sb.WriteByte("x")). Print which is faster.
hint: buildWithPlus: for i:=0;i<n;i++ { result += "x" }. buildWithBuilder: for i:=0;i<n;i++ { sb.WriteByte(120) }; return sb.String()
